doc: Declarative spec. The agent substitutes <placeholders> and EXECUTES. One superset query feeds every axis. MCP paths: ../../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md

queries.big_result: persisted to file as data.json {columns, rows}

context.doc: Per-account input — never hardcoded. Build from account signals first (brand campaign names, company name, regions served); confirm the doubtful; ask only what can't be inferred.

process: process.py data.json context.json [account_profile.json]  ->  { terms:[multi-label cards], rollup } ; it RUNS ../duplicates/scripts/process.py as a subprocess for the cannibalization axis (reuse, not fork).
llm_step: fill each term's relevance[] verdict (apply ../../relevance rubric), resolve intent:null, finalize recommended_action on the framework ladder, write action_detail + the 3-string synthesis.
